{{Quote|Used by New Republic troops in the battle of Glom Tho, the decisive encounter of the Hevvrol Sector Campaign. Achieved a record satisfaction rating of 97.3 percent!|An advertisement for the NeuroSaav Sure-Sight|<ref name="RPG2E" />}}
The '''Sure-Sight''' was a [[Weapon/Legends|weapon]] [[Scope/Legends|scope]]<ref name="EGWT" /> manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Technologies/Legends|Neuro-Saav Technologies]] and used by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The Sure-Sight utilized holo-imaging technology, computerized light amplification, [[heat baffler]]s, [[image sifter]]s, and [[radiation signature micro-sensor]]s to positively identify targets over 500 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] away in the most difficult conditions<ref name="RPG2E" /> such as near darkness, low-light conditions, and fog. The crosshairs on the scope allowed for instanteous targeting, with readouts that automatically displayed the range to a target.<ref name="EGWT" />

The scope also came with [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] correction software, which meant it could be run by most [[Class two droid/Legends|second-degree]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] meeting [[GalactiDroid Architecture]] Class 2-B standards. There was also a special [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinocular]] mini-comp attachment available. The Sure-Sight required a buyer to possess a [[New Republic Weapon Class III permit]].<ref name="RPG2E" />

The Sure-Sight was used extensively during the [[Battle of Glom Tho]], where it achieved a record satisfaction rating of 97.3 percent by New Republic [[Soldier/Legends|troops]].<ref name="RPG2E" />
